title: [MTR3/4]KTX_EUM
description: This resourcepack adds KTX-EUM & UTY EMU-250 Trains for Minecraft Transit Railway
body:
![Korail KTX-EUM High speed train fleet](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/36dcfcdfb463ea29f83edff9b24fa651c52d8d4e_0.webp)

This resource pack adds KTX-EUM High Speed Train fleet for Minecraft Transit Railway mod.

This pack requires **Minecraft Transit Railway** Mod (MTR3, MTR4) and **Nemo's Transit Expansion** for MTR3 (NTE)

**Terms & Disclaimer**

* This RP can be applied manually in the 'Resource Packs' page in the same way that other RPs are applied after Installing Required Mods and Addons.
* This product is not related to the actual company that operates the train.
* Trains are free to use according to the terms and conditions enclosed in RP.
* Before using, please set the JVM arguments to 6GB or higher. It may take some time to load this RP.
* MTR3 and MTR4 use different versions, and for MTR3, it is recommended that the train consist of 6 cars.

**Contents**

Korail Class 150000 (KTX-EUM)(for MTR3 & MTR4)

O'zbeksiston Temir Yo'llari Афрасияб EMU-250 (Concept livery)
